pattern: Greedily assign the larger ball color to odd or even rows, then simulate row consumption to find the taller arrangement.
hints: Each row i (1-indexed) uses i balls of one color, alternating colors per row — so odd rows use one color and even rows use the other.
Try both assignments (red on odd rows vs. red on even rows) and take the maximum height reachable under each.
Simulate greedily: keep consuming balls row by row until either color runs out.

edge_inputs.description: very unequal — one color barely usable
equal balls does not guarantee equal height — check both orientations
red exhausted on row 2 for one orientation

stress.description: random red and blue counts in [1,100]
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    red = rng.randint(1, 100)
    blue = rng.randint(1, 100)
    return [red, blue]
